description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular mobile phone with a black front face dominated by a glass touchscreen display. The front features a circular home button below the screen and a speaker grille above, flanked by a front-facing camera. The back is metallic gray with a prominent silver Apple logo centered near the top, a small camera lens and flash in the upper left corner, and subtle branding text near the bottom. The sides are silver with visible physical buttons: the left edge has two round volume buttons and a mute switch, while the right edge is smooth. The phone is slim, with a flat profile and slightly rounded corners, and the materials suggest a combination of glass, aluminum, and plastic. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, typical of Apple's iPhone 5/5s/SE series.
description: A slim, rectangular mobile phone with a black glass front, metallic gray back, and silver sides, featuring a touchscreen, Apple logo, and physical buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black glass touchscreen, circular home button, and app icons on the display.
description_view_1: Left edge view displaying the slim silver profile and two round volume buttons with a mute switch.
description_view_2: Back view revealing the metallic gray finish, silver Apple logo, camera lens, flash, and branding text.
description_view_3: Right edge view showing a smooth silver profile with no visible buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the device, prominent and reflective.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a grid of colorful app icons, including Messages, Calendar, Photos, Camera, and others, with a dock at the bottom and a wallpaper image partially visible behind the icons.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens and flash are located in the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Two round volume buttons and a mute switch are on the left edge; a circular home button is below the screen on the front; the right edge is smooth with no visible buttons.
